zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I於1120年出生在德國海因里希_時，他的父親Graf Eilbert von Wölpe I31歲，母親Adelheid von Wassel22歲。他於大約1150年與Richenza在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 尼波-維尼波格 (維)額爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1171年享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I于1120年出生在德国海因里希_时，他的父亲Graf Eilbert von Wölpe I31岁，母亲Adelheid von Wassel22岁。他于大约1150年与Richenza在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 尼波-維尼波格 (維)額爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1171年享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Wölpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ethiopian: from the personal name Wolde, which is interpreted as ‘my son’ in the Ge’ez or Amharic languages. It often forms part of a Christian name, such as Woldemariam , and in this case it translates as ‘son of’. — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

North German: habitational name from either of two places so named in Mecklenburg or Pomerania or from Wolda in Lower Saxony. Possibly also a topographic name from an inflected form of Middle Low German wolt, walt ‘woods’.

variants.name: Woldemariam
meanings: Ethiopian (also Wolde Mariam): from the male personal name Wolde Mariam, which has the Christian religious meaning ‘son of Mary’ (see Wolde and Mariam ). — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

variants.name: Woldemichael
meanings: Ethiopian (also Wolde Michael): from the personal name Wolde Michael, which has the Christian religious meaning ‘son of St. Michael’ (see Wolde and Michael ). — Note: Since Ethiopians do not have hereditary surnames, this name was registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US.

nameMeanings.name: Bernhard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bernard
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I was born in 1120, in Prussia, Germany, his father, Graf Eilbert von Wölpe I, was 31 and his mother, Adelheid von Wassel, was 22. He married Richenza about 1150, in Wölpe, Nienburg (Weser), Nienburg, Lower Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1171, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I est né en 1120, à Prusse, Allemagne, son père, Graf Eilbert von Wölpe I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Wassel, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Richenza environ 1150, à Wölpe, Nienburg (Weser), Landkreis Nienburg-Weser, Niedersachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1171, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I 1120 in Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Eilbert von Wölpe I 31 und seine Mutter Adelheid von Wassel 22. Er hat um 1150 in Wölpe, Nienburg (Weser), Landkreis Nienburg-Weser, Niedersachsen, Deutschland Richenza geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1171 im Alter von 51 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I è nato il nel 1120 nel Preußen, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Eilbert von Wölpe I, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid von Wassel, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Richenza circa 1150, nel Wölpe, Nienburg (Weser), Landkreis Nienburg-Weser, Niedersachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1171, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Graf Bernhard von Wölpe Iが1120年にドイツプレウssンで生まれた時，父Graf Eilbert von Wölpe Iは31歳，母Adelheid von Wasselは22歳であった。約1150年にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス ニーンブルグ-ウエセルニーンブルグ (ウエセル)ウoルペでRichenzaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1171年に51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I(이)가 1120년 독일 프레우ss에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Eilbert von Wölpe I(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid von Wassel(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1150년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 니버그-w세르 니버그 (w세) wo프에서 Richenza(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1171년 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1133/1136: de 8 de janeiro de 1133 a 7 de janeiro de 1137
pt.Erichshagen-Wölpe, Niedersachsen, Deutsc: Wölpe, Erichshagen, Landkreis Nienburg-Weser, Niedersachsen, Alemanha

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I nasceu em 1120, em Preußen, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Eilbert von Wölpe I, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Wassel, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Richenza aproximadamente 1150, em Wölpe, Nienburg (Weser), Landkreis Nienburg-Weser, Niedersachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1171, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I родился в 1120 г. в местности Пруссия, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Eilbert von Wölpe I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Wassel, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Richenza около 1150 г. в местности вoлп, ниенбург (весир), ландкрис ниенбург-весир, ниедирсачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1171 г. в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Graf Bernhard von Wölpe I nació en 1120, en Preußen, Alemania, su papá, Graf Eilbert von Wölpe I, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Wassel, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Richenza aproximadamente 1150, en Wölpe, Nienburg (Weser), Landkreis Nienburg-Weser, Niedersachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1171, a la edad de 51 años.
